flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Hartnell College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Hartnell College fell 33% between 2009 and 2010 (9.1% → 6.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Hartnell College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($575 → $744).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Hartnell College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (30.0% vs 35.6%).
